top_signals.title: Tech Weakness Resumes After Samsung Misses Lofty AI Expectations
top_signals.summary: US stock futures pointed to renewed weakness in technology shares after Samsung Electronics Co.’s earnings failed to satisfy investors, renewing pressure on chipmakers across global markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tech Volatility Hits Highest Since Dot-Com Bust Next to S&P 500
top_signals.summary: The higher the rally in technology high-flyers, the louder the anxiety around a new wave of turbulence in the group.

top_signals.title: Coinbase gets UK license to expand into derivatives, equities
top_signals.summary: Coinbase said its UK investment services authorization will allow institutional and advanced traders to access derivatives, while retail users will be able to trade equities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
